/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Scenes/TitleScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Scenes/GameScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Scenes/GameClearScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Entities/Ball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Entities/Paddle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Entities/Block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/Entities/BlockManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/System/CollisionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Breakout.dir/src/UI/Score.cpp.o -o Breakout  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-audio.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
